001package guiEmailRegister;
002
003import javafx.stage.Stage;
004import applicationMain.ValidationUtil;
005import database.Database;
006import entityClasses.User;
007import guiUserLogin.ViewUserLogin;
008import guiMultipleRoleDispatch.ViewMultipleRoleDispatch;
009
010/*******
011 * <p> Title: ControllerEmailRegister Class. </p>
012 * 
013 * <p> Description: The Controller for the Email Registration page.</p>
014 * 
015 * <p> Copyright: Modified 2026 </p>
016 * 
017 * @version 1.00                2026-02-08 Initial version
018 *  
019 */
020
021public class ControllerEmailRegister {
022        
023        // Reference for the in-memory database
024        private static Database theDatabase = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.database;
025        
026        /**********
027         * <p> Method: doCreateAccount(Stage theStage) </p>
028         * 
029         * <p> Description: This method validates the email registration form and creates a new account.</p>
030         * 
031         * @param theStage specifies the JavaFX Stage
032         * 
033         */
034        public static void doCreateAccount(Stage theStage) {
035                
036                // Get the entered values
037                String email = ViewEmailRegister.text_Email.getText().trim();
038                String username = ViewEmailRegister.text_Username.getText().trim();
039                String password1 = ViewEmailRegister.text_Password1.getText();
040                String password2 = ViewEmailRegister.text_Password2.getText();
041                
042                // Validate email address
043                String emailError = ValidationUtil.validateEmail(email);
044                if (emailError != null) {
045                        ViewEmailRegister.alertEmailError.setContentText(emailError);
046                        ViewEmailRegister.alertEmailError.showAndWait();
047                        return;
048                }
049                
050                // Validate username
051                String usernameError = ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId(username);
052                if (usernameError != null) {
053                        ViewEmailRegister.alertEmailError.setContentText(usernameError);
054                        ViewEmailRegister.alertEmailError.showAndWait();
055                        return;
056                }
057                
058                // Check if username already exists
059                if (theDatabase.doesUserExist(username)) {
060                        ViewEmailRegister.alertEmailError.setContentText("Username already exists. Please choose a different username.");
061                        ViewEmailRegister.alertEmailError.showAndWait();
062                        return;
063                }
064                
065                // Validate passwords
066                String passwordError = ValidationUtil.validatePassword(password1);
067                if (passwordError != null) {
068                        ViewEmailRegister.alertPasswordError.setContentText(passwordError);
069                        ViewEmailRegister.alertPasswordError.showAndWait();
070                        return;
071                }
072                if (password2 == null || password2.isEmpty()) {
073                        ViewEmailRegister.alertPasswordError.setContentText("Password is required.");
074                        ViewEmailRegister.alertPasswordError.showAndWait();
075                        return;
076                }
077
078                if (!password1.equals(password2)) {
079                        ViewEmailRegister.alertPasswordError.setContentText("Passwords do not match. Please try again.");
080                        ViewEmailRegister.alertPasswordError.showAndWait();
081                        return;
082                }
083                
084                // Determine roles based on invitation (default to student if none)
085                String invitedRole = ViewEmailRegister.invitationRole == null ? "" : ViewEmailRegister.invitationRole;
086                boolean adminRole = false;
087                boolean studentRole = false;
088                boolean staffRole = false;
089                if ("admin".equalsIgnoreCase(invitedRole)) {
090                        adminRole = true;
091                } else if ("staff".equalsIgnoreCase(invitedRole)) {
092                        staffRole = true;
093                } else {
094                        studentRole = true;
095                }
096
097                // Create the new user account with role from invitation
098                // Constructor: User(username, password, firstName, middleName, lastName, preferredFirstName, 
099                //              emailAddress, adminRole, role1, role2)
100                User newUser = new User(username, password1, "", "", "", "", email, adminRole, studentRole, staffRole);
101                
102                // Add the user to the database
103                try {
104                        theDatabase.register(newUser);
105                } catch (Exception e) {
106                        ViewEmailRegister.alertEmailError.setContentText("Error creating account: " + e.getMessage());
107                        ViewEmailRegister.alertEmailError.showAndWait();
108                        return;
109                }
110                
111                // Remove invitation after use
112                if (ViewEmailRegister.invitationCode != null && !ViewEmailRegister.invitationCode.isEmpty()) {
113                        theDatabase.removeInvitationAfterUse(ViewEmailRegister.invitationCode);
114                        ViewEmailRegister.invitationCode = "";
115                        ViewEmailRegister.invitationRole = "";
116                }
117                
118                // Show success message
119                ViewEmailRegister.alertAccountCreated.showAndWait();
120                
121                // Log the user in and dispatch to appropriate home page
122                ViewMultipleRoleDispatch.displayMultipleRoleDispatch(theStage, newUser);
123        }
124        
125        /**********
126         * <p> Method: performCancel(Stage theStage) </p>
127         * 
128         * <p> Description: This method returns to the login page.</p>
129         * 
130         * @param theStage specifies the JavaFX Stage
131         * 
132         */
133        public static void performCancel(Stage theStage) {
134                ViewUserLogin.displayUserLogin(theStage);
135        }
136}
